name: Add items to the cart and verify the totals

steps.text: Add the "Desk Lamp" to the cart twice.
Add the "Coffee Mug" to the cart once.

criteria.text: The Subtotal equals the sum of the line totals, where each line total is the item's unit price multiplied by its quantity.
The Tax equals 10% of the Subtotal, rounded to the nearest cent — it must not be zero or a different proportion.
The Total equals the Subtotal plus the Tax.
